channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: How a father and daughter duped NYC's art world with fake Warhols and Banksys
item.description: A father and daughter in New Jersey have pleaded guilty to running a years-long counterfeiting scheme to trick art galleries and auction houses into buying forged paintings
item.content:encoded:
A father and daughter in New Jersey have pleaded guilty to running a years-long counterfeiting scheme to trick art galleries and auction houses into buying forged paintings

(Image credit: Jake Offenhartz)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Camp Mystic parents ask Texas lawmakers to block the camp from re-opening
item.description: A Texas legislative commission heard testimony from families of some of the people who died in the 2025 flooding. Owners of the all-girls Camp Mystic also testified about emergency preparedness plans.
item.content:encoded: A Texas legislative commission heard testimony from families of some of the people who died in the 2025 flooding. Owners of the all-girls Camp Mystic also testified about emergency preparedness plans.
item.dc:creator: Kailey Hunt

item.title: Supreme Court appears to lean toward ending TPS for some migrants
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court appeared sympathetic to the Trump administration's move to end temporary protected status for Haitians and Syrians in the country.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. Supreme Court appeared sympathetic to the Trump administration's move to end temporary protected status for Haitians and Syrians in the country.



(Image credit: Roberto Schmidt)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: DOD officials say Iran war has cost $25 billion so far during Congressional grilling
item.description: The Pentagon says that the cost of the war with Iran is estimated to be some $25 billion. Defense officials were appearing on the Hill for budget discussions.
item.content:encoded: The Pentagon says that the cost of the war with Iran is estimated to be some $25 billion. Defense officials were appearing on the Hill for budget discussions.
item.dc:creator: Tom Bowman

item.title: Florida lawmakers pass a voting map that could help Republicans flip 4 House seats
item.description: The map drawn by Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis boosts President Trump's effort to reshape voting before the midterm elections. The GOP likely holds a slight edge over Democrats in redistricting now.
item.content:encoded:
The map drawn by Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis boosts President Trump's effort to reshape voting before the midterm elections. The GOP likely holds a slight edge over Democrats in redistricting now.

(Image credit: Mike Stewart)
item.dc:creator: Tristan Wood

item.title: How Trump's EPA head has transformed the agency — and sided with polluters
item.description: New Yorker writer Elizabeth Kolbert says EPA chief Lee Zeldin has rescinded regulations, cut or eliminated departments and terminated the jobs of many scientists. Trump calls Zeldin "our secret weapon."
item.content:encoded: New Yorker writer Elizabeth Kolbert says EPA chief Lee Zeldin has rescinded regulations, cut or eliminated departments and terminated the jobs of many scientists. Trump calls Zeldin "our secret weapon."
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: '8647' got James Comey indicted. What exactly does it mean?
item.description: A grand jury charged Comey with threatening Trump's life through his since-deleted 2025 post of seashells forming "8647." Trump is the 47th president, and the term "86" has a few possible meanings.
item.content:encoded:
A grand jury charged Comey with threatening Trump's life through his since-deleted 2025 post of seashells forming "8647." Trump is the 47th president, and the term "86" has a few possible meanings.

(Image credit: Jon Cherry)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: The U.S. Supreme Court strikes another severe blow to the Voting Rights Act
item.description: The court, in a 6-3 decision along partisan lines, ruled that Louisiana's 2024 election map, which created a second majority-Black congressional district, was "an unconstitutional racial gerrymander."
item.content:encoded:
The court, in a 6-3 decision along partisan lines, ruled that Louisiana's 2024 election map, which created a second majority-Black congressional district, was "an unconstitutional racial gerrymander."

(Image credit: Kevin Dietsch)
item.dc:creator: Miles Parks

item.title: As Supreme Court weighs Trump's immigration policy, senior citizens join the fight
item.description: As the Supreme Court weighs the Trump administration's termination of Temporary Protected Status for Haitians and Syrians, seniors are advocating for protections for their immigrant caregivers.
item.content:encoded:
As the Supreme Court weighs the Trump administration's termination of Temporary Protected Status for Haitians and Syrians, seniors are advocating for protections for their immigrant caregivers.

(Image credit: Andrea Hsu)
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu

item.title: Families sue OpenAI over Canadian mass shooter's use of ChatGPT
item.description: The lawsuits claim OpenAI was negligent for failing to report the shooter to authorities after her account was flagged for "gun violence activity and planning."
item.content:encoded:
The lawsuits claim OpenAI was negligent for failing to report the shooter to authorities after her account was flagged for "gun violence activity and planning."

(Image credit: Paige Taylor White)
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel
